_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Architect design documents  that describe input, output, and logical operation.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing enterprise data architecture artifacts, including data flow diagrams, entity-relationship models, data domain maps, and integration architecture documentation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-004 (RM, cosine: 0.517), AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.515).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.489). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [architect, describe, design, documents, input, logical] vs WIDAI-only terms [architecture, artifacts, data, diagrams, documentation, domain] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.867, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (94.9%). The model interprets "Architect design documents  that describe input, output, and logical operation." as logically implying aspects of "Skill in producing enterprise data architecture artifacts, including data flow d" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Intersects with' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 ≈ STS 0.489 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [architect, describe, design, documents, input, logical]. WIDAI terms: [architecture, artifacts, data, diagrams, documentation, domain].
